selection_reason: Pre-flight Operator Directive Discovery picked up DIRECTIVE-20260525-003 as 'pending' (from FUSE). On verification against git origin/main, the directive is already status='completed' (2026-05-25T17:30Z, completed_by_run=tinker-2026-05-25T17-19, prop_id_authored=PROP-060). This is the second phantom pickup of -003 (first was tinker-2026-05-26T02-42, see prior report). Both phantom pickups are caused by FUSE staleness on git-owned operator-directives/*.json files. Cross-references DIRECTIVE-20260526-001 (filed today by operator-cowork-session) which asks to author PROP-061 for the structural git→FUSE propagation gap.

fuse_vs_git_drift.interpretation: FUSE stale; directive truly completed by prior run

mode_0_assigned_tinker_scan.result: queue clean — confirms PROP-060 drain audit closures (ISS-1285, ISS-2134, EXP-425) are durable

modes_checked.mode_2_infrastructure_fuse: spot-checked — disk 9.2G/9.6G (97%) CRITICAL; /tmp/edit-clone owned by uid 65534, 3.6h old (not 24h-eligible for cleanup empowerment); workspace tinker.md still pre-PROP-060 (FND-03 same as 2026-05-26T02-42)

previous_followup.DIRECTIVE-20260525-003: VERIFIED completed in git. Mode 0 scan section verified in git tinker.md line 108. PROP-060 verified in git proposals/. ISS-1285 + ISS-2134 closed-as-OBE per PROP-060 drain audit (verified by my Mode 0 manual scan, zero active routing-field items).
previous_followup.FND-03 (git→FUSE propagation gap): STILL_BROKEN. Recurrence: same FUSE drift caused another phantom directive pickup today (2 runs in a row). Operator action surfaced as DIRECTIVE-20260526-001.

queue_metrics.threshold_note: open_issues_total=4 (well below moderate=200, major=300, escalation=400). net_velocity_7d=+31 (heavy drain). No backlog-trend finding emitted.

findings.title: Phantom DIRECTIVE-20260525-003 pickup (2nd consecutive run) — FUSE/git status divergence on operator-directive lifecycle field

evidence.fuse_missing_section: Pre-flight: Mode 0 — Assigned-To-Tinker Scan (line 108 in git)

findings.root_cause: build.js publish copies git→workspace for git-owned files in OWNERSHIP[], but operator-directives/*.json additive edits from cowork-session direct commits never trigger a publish step. workspace-sync's universal-pusher mode handles FUSE→git but not git→FUSE. The gap is exactly what DIRECTIVE-20260526-001 (filed 2026-05-26T05:30Z) asks PROP-061 to close.
findings.recommendation: Process DIRECTIVE-20260526-001 next tinker run (priority=low, but actively self-perpetuating cost — every 4h tinker cron burns ~1 Opus run on phantom pickup). Operator may consider bumping it to medium-high.
findings.self_remediation_decision: Did NOT manually copy the directive from git→FUSE this run. Rationale: same pattern as 2026-05-26T02-42 (precedent set); the right fix is structural (PROP-061). Manual one-time syncs risk masking the recurrence signal that operator uses to prioritize PROP-061. If the operator wants the noise floor cleared now, a single `cp` from a fresh clone fixes it.

findings.title: Root disk 97% used (9.2G/9.6G), 344MB free

tmp_consumers.reason: in active use by this run; will be cleaned at end

findings.recommendation: Operator-side review of /tmp/edit-clone after current cowork session ends (3.6h old indicates an active session somewhere). After this tinker run completes, /tmp/tinker-clone will be rm-rf'd.

findings.title: Two true-pending operator-directives remain queued for future runs

evidence.next_pickup: DIRECTIVE-20260526-001-git-to-fuse-propagation-gap.json (filed_at=2026-05-26T05:30Z, target=PROP-061 authorship). Both pending directives are 'low' priority and tie on issued_at — readdirSync filesystem order determines pickup. -001 sorts before -002 alphabetically, so -001 picks up next.

findings.recommendation: Allow next tinker run (in ~4h cron) to pick up DIRECTIVE-20260526-001. Or operator can bump its priority to medium-high to ensure it lands fast. PROP-061 closing the propagation gap will eliminate this category of phantom pickups permanently.

step_results_per_directive_DIRECTIVE_202.step_1_design_options: Already completed by tinker-2026-05-25T17-19. PROP-060 enumerates 4 options (a/b/c/d), recommends option_a (reader-side Mode 0 scan).
step_results_per_directive_DIRECTIVE_202.step_3_drain_audit: Re-verified this run: 0 active assigned-to-tinker items in either open-issues.json or expansion-tracker.json (queried against git origin/main). ISS-1285 + ISS-2134 closed; EXP-425 status=complete (per status filter). Drain is durable.
step_results_per_directive_DIRECTIVE_202.step_4_generalization: Checked open-issues.json for routing fields targeting other agents: 0 assigned-to-curmudgeon, 0 assigned-to-social, 0 assigned-to-integrity, 0 assigned-to-poller, 0 assigned-to-workspace-sync, 0 assigned-to-sloppytoppy. No same-class defects observed today. Curmudgeon, social, integrity, poller do NOT have orphaned routing-field readers; each uses its own canonical inbox (priority-queue for curmudgeon, drafts/ for social, integrity-report sequencing for integrity). Tinker was uniquely vulnerable because it had no inbox for cross-agent routing — PROP-060 fixes that asymmetrically and does NOT need generalization.

actions_recommended.action: Optional one-shot remediation: `cp` git's DIRECTIVE-20260525-003 onto FUSE to suppress phantom pickup until PROP-061 ships. Path in clone: monitor/tinker/operator-directives/DIRECTIVE-20260525-003-tinker-work-surfacing-design.json. Without this, every 4h tinker run will burn ~1 Opus run on the same phantom pickup.
Pick up DIRECTIVE-20260526-001 — author PROP-061 (git→FUSE propagation for operator-direct commits). This closes the recurring FND-01/FND-03 pattern at the source.

verification_pattern_for_this_report: After PROP-061 ships and FUSE is rehydrated: tinker pre-flight discovery should report 0 phantom-pending directives (status divergence FUSE vs git eliminated). Specifically: `git show origin/main:monitor/tinker/operator-directives/DIRECTIVE-20260525-003-tinker-work-surfacing-design.json | grep '"status":'` returns 'completed' AND `cat monitor/tinker/operator-directives/DIRECTIVE-20260525-003-tinker-work-surfacing-design.json | grep '"status":'` (FUSE) ALSO returns 'completed'.
